Targeted v002 correction. Preserve the approved palette, fixed high-three-quarter camera and four route stages, but rebuild the board with much stronger icon-level simplification.

Remove every visible white cross, divider and rectangular panel frame; separate the four frameless views only with soft mist and rice-paper negative space. Remove all boats.

View 1: place the north gate at the far screen-right behind the player. Put the player left of the gate, clearly facing left along the gentle S-road, never toward the gate.
View 2: the road enters from screen right, bends past one unmistakably largest shop and exits left. Keep smaller houses strongly staggered in depth, never in a row.
View 3: the same road enters from the right and crosses one offset bridge toward the left bank. Keep the bridge broad and simple with no masonry joints or repeated balusters.
View 4: continue the same river and path to a south-bank dock in the left half of the image. Show only platform, posts, steps and a minimal railing; no boat.

Keep the north gate, largest shop and colored small-house group identical across every view: same silhouette, roof color, scale hierarchy and relative geography. Use one consistent camera yaw and pitch, translated along the route.

Reduce every object to at most three primary masses and five internal accent-stroke groups. Buildings use one wall mass, one roof mass and one shadow mass, with at most one door and one window cue. Trees use one trunk and two or three broad canopy lobes. Rock clusters use two or three large silhouettes with no pebbles. Water uses two broad color bands and no more than five long directional strokes per view. Far Paper2D mountains use two pale flat silhouette layers. Keep dense foliage only as a few large asymmetric clusters on the outer edges and preserve the open lower center.

The largest shop always has an ink-green roof; the small-house group always keeps red, indigo-blue and teal roofs; the north gate always keeps one warm red roof. No borders, boats, masonry seams, pebble noise, leaf-by-leaf foliage or lower-center blockage.

production_guidance: exact roads rivers and terrain follow town_layout_contract
visual_risks: shore pebbles tree clumps and light horizontal rows are not PCG density
